purpose: Archive the intended scan semantics while no executable tooling exists.
instruction: scan only discovers which files are currently governed by this skill
scan keeps the existing filename-based match boundary
scan does not write managed copies
workflow: walk the workspace using the established managed filename rules
exclude Octopus_OS and all existing exclusion domains
produce a managed target list for human review
rules: do not invent an executable scan command during the no-tool phase
scan semantics remain archival until new tooling is rebuilt
